creator: sharin@gmail.com
text:
IBM_X3250M4_bsd13] ~# pciconf -lv pcib6
pcib6@pci0:3:0:0:       class=0x060400 rev=0x00 hdr=0x01 vendor=0x1912 device=0x0012 subvendor=0x0000 subdevice=0x0000
    vendor     = 'Renesas Technology Corp.'
    device     = 'SH7757 PCIe-PCI Bridge [PPB]'
    class      = bridge
    subclass   = PCI-PCI
IBM_X3250M4_bsd13] ~# pciconf -lv pcib7
pcib7@pci0:2:1:0:       class=0x060400 rev=0x00 hdr=0x01 vendor=0x1912 device=0x0013 subvendor=0x0000 subdevice=0x0000
    vendor     = 'Renesas Technology Corp.'
    device     = 'SH7757 PCIe Switch [PS]'
    class      = bridge
    subclass   = PCI-PCI
IBM_X3250M4_bsd13] ~# pciconf -lv pcib8
pcib8@pci0:0:28:1:      class=0x060400 rev=0xb5 hdr=0x01 vendor=0x8086 device=0x1c12 subvendor=0x1014 subdevice=0x3a42
    vendor     = 'Intel Corporation'
    device     = '6 Series/C200 Series Chipset Family PCI Express Root Port 2'
    class      = bridge
    subclass   = PCI-PCI
IBM_X3250M4_bsd13] ~# pciconf -lv vgapci0
vgapci0@pci0:4:0:0:     class=0x030000 rev=0x00 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x102b device=0x0534 subvendor=0x1014 subdevice=0x0405
    vendor     = 'Matrox Electronics Systems Ltd.'
    device     = 'G200eR2'
    class      = display
    subclass   = VGA
